violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings under and on retail shelving. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
Packages of granola and oatmeal were observed in contact with rodent droppings. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
Retail shelving was observed with rodent droppings and food debris. Shelves were cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by nesting material in electrical room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per PIC, mice are eating the insulation in the door to the electrical room. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The door to the hallway leading to loading dock, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -floors of the walk-in -walk-in fan guards (work order for cleaning has been placed) -beverage guides in the walk-in -gaskets and door opening of reach-in ice cream freezer -floors in back room under shelving -styrofoam insulation on floor of electrical room. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the walk-in cooler. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
